[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0011111110 7
1 1110001011 6
2 0000000000 a
3 0000000000 a
4 0001100011 4
5 1100010001 4
6 1001001011 5
7 1100110010 5

70 1110001000 4
